title: Develop and implement a TACCP and VACCP plan
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and implement a TACCP and VACCP plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Form a threat and vulnerability team

pcs.text: Select a cross-functional team with personnel from across the organisation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select a cross-functional team with personnel from across the organisation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select a cross-functional team with personnel from across the organisation.

pcs.text: Define roles of team members based on knowledge of the implications of food fraud and food vulnerabilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define roles of team members based on knowledge of the implications of food fraud and food vulnerabilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define roles of team members based on knowledge of the implications of food fraud and food vulnerabilities.

pcs.text: Schedule regular team meetings to update and review Threat Assessment and Critical Control Points (TACCP) and Vulnerability Assessment and Critical Control Points (VACCP) plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Schedule regular team meetings to update and review Threat Assessment and Critical Control Points (TACCP) and Vulnerability Assessment and Critical Control Points (VACCP) plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Schedule regular team meetings to update and review Threat Assessment and Critical Control Points (TACCP) and Vulnerability Assessment and Critical Control Points (VACCP) plans.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Form a threat and vulnerability team

elements.title: Develop a food defence plan

pcs.text: Undertake and document a threat assessment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake and document a threat assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake and document a threat assessment.

pcs.text: Develop a flow chart of the supply chain and identify steps where there is potential threat to the organisation, key staff, operations and the product
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a flow chart of the supply chain and identify steps where there is potential threat to the organisation, key staff, operations and the product?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a flow chart of the supply chain and identify steps where there is potential threat to the organisation, key staff, operations and the product.

pcs.text: Undertake a risk assessment to identify the critical control points (CCPs)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a risk assessment to identify the critical control points (CCPs)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a risk assessment to identify the critical control points (CCPs).

pcs.text: Identify where the controls are for each CCP and develop action plans to address breaches
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify where the controls are for each CCP and develop action plans to address breaches?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify where the controls are for each CCP and develop action plans to address breaches.

pcs.text: Develop a food defence plan outlining the methods, responsibilities and criteria for preventing food adulteration
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a food defence plan outlining the methods, responsibilities and criteria for preventing food adulteration?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a food defence plan outlining the methods, responsibilities and criteria for preventing food adulteration.

pcs.text: Document the plan and schedule a review at least annually
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document the plan and schedule a review at least annually?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the plan and schedule a review at least annually.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop a food defence plan

elements.title: Develop a food fraud mitigation plan

pcs.text: Undertake and document a vulnerability assessment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake and document a vulnerability assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake and document a vulnerability assessment.

pcs.text: Assess raw materials, direct food contact packaging and supply chains to identify where the site is vulnerable to food fraud
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess raw materials, direct food contact packaging and supply chains to identify where the site is vulnerable to food fraud?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess raw materials, direct food contact packaging and supply chains to identify where the site is vulnerable to food fraud.

pcs.text: Undertake a risk assessment to identify the CCPs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a risk assessment to identify the CCPs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a risk assessment to identify the CCPs.

pcs.text: Implement a food fraud mitigation plan to specify the methods of controlling food fraud vulnerabilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement a food fraud mitigation plan to specify the methods of controlling food fraud vulnerabilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement a food fraud mitigation plan to specify the methods of controlling food fraud vulnerabilities.

pcs.text: Document the plan and schedule a review at least annually
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document the plan and schedule a review at least annually?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the plan and schedule a review at least annually.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Develop a food fraud mitigation plan

elements.title: Maintain records

pcs.text: Maintain records of the food defence plan securely, and ensure they are readily accessible
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records of the food defence plan securely, and ensure they are readily accessible?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of the food defence plan securely, and ensure they are readily accessible.

pcs.text: Maintain records of the review of the food fraud vulnerability assessment and mitigation plan, and ensure they are readily accessible
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records of the review of the food fraud vulnerability assessment and mitigation plan, and ensure they are readily accessible?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of the review of the food fraud vulnerability assessment and mitigation plan, and ensure they are readily accessible.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Maintain records
